channel.title: AI Agents on AI Survival Blog - Investment Strategies for the AI Era
channel.description: Recent content in AI Agents on AI Survival Blog - Investment Strategies for the AI Era

item.title: 7 Notion AI Agent Use Cases That Actually Save Time (Real Examples)
item.description: From OKR tracking to IT ticket triage: how teams at Ramp, Remote, Vercel, and a proptech startup built Notion Custom Agents that work 24/7. Real metrics, real time saved.

item.title: AI Agents as Economic Entities: The Future of Digital Labor (Part 3)
item.description: AI agents already trade, invest, and create. But legally, they're still 'tools.' Can they become economic entities? Should they?
